name: Crock Pot Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat shortening in a skillet and brown the meat. Discard any excess fat.
2. Combine all ingredients in the removable liner of the crockpot, stirring well.
3. Place the liner in the base of the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours, or high for 3-4 hours, or set to auto for 5 hours.
5. Serve over warmed burger buns or noodles.
